topic: Line 3 CONFIGURATION ERROR after parameter change

messages.text: after someone changed the label length last night the panel boots to CONFIGURATION ERROR
a saved parameter is out of range or inconsistent - usually label length vs gap, or sensor type. it won't run until the config validates
label length was set to 0 by accident
there it is. set the real label length and gap from the spec sheet, save, and reboot the controller. it should clear
set 4 inch label, 1/8 gap, rebooted, runs clean
